title: SquidCraft M
description: Core modpack for the SquidCraft M server
body:
# SquidCraft M

**SquidCraft M** is a Fabric 1.20.1 modpack that aims to combine well-known exploration, building, QOL, and world generation mods for an extensive minecraft experience.

## ❓ Who is this Modpack for?
If you are looking for a fun singleplayer experience or a complete modpack for an enjoyable SMP, this modpack is for you.
### Players
This modpack is primarily built for a singleplayer or client experience. Installing should be very easy and you can get right into playing with very little setup.
### Server Owners
In the 'Modpack Contents' section below, a link to a complete list of mods is included. This list details which mods are client-sided and which are server-sided, which will help you setup a server-sided modpack. A completely configured server modpack will be coming soon (~80% complete).

## 📥 How to Install/Play
*WARNING: You will likely need to increase the memory allocated to the instance! 4GB-8GB is recommended.*
### Method 1 (Modrinth App)
1. Download and install the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)
2. Click the search button and type "SquidCraft M" in the Modpacks section
3. Click Install
4. Run the newly created **SquidCraft M** instance from the **Library** tab in the Modrinth App

## 📖 Modpack Contents
The following is a brief summary of the major mods in this modpack. A complete list can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRwOSKnGtb8oiqKCfDCtku7Wn3tY3azyYM6sg7mT1fMKeJ2Mk1MadUGrls7VLGefywWpEkQN4TbmePK/pubhtml?gid=0&single=true).

### Biomes/World Generation
- [William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo)
- [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds)
- [YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments)
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

### Content Mods
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Cluttered](https://modrinth.com/mod/cluttered)
- [Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul)
- [Plenty of Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/plenty-of-armors)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)
- [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)

This the the official core modpack required to join the SquidCraft M modded surival server. Install using the Modrinth launcher!

## 🔒 Private Server
*This modpack was originally intended for use on a private modded survival server. If this relates to you, please read the following.*

In order to join, you must;
1. Know the author of this modpack (zane/squidee)
2. [Submit an application](https://squidee.dev/squidcraft/join)* with your Minecraft JE IGN
3. Join the server at `mc.squidee.dev` on a 1.20.1 Fabric client with this modpack installed (refer to installation section above)

\* Filling out the form will make it easier to whitelist your account, rather than DM'ing me. (You do not need to provide your name, it just makes it easier to identify you.)

## 📄 Credits
If you would like an extensive list of the mods used, links to their Modrinth pages can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRwOSKnGtb8oiqKCfDCtku7Wn3tY3azyYM6sg7mT1fMKeJ2Mk1MadUGrls7VLGefywWpEkQN4TbmePK/pubhtml?gid=0&single=true).
